series_metadata.series_title: AG Litigation Pleadings for Claims handled by the AG''s office
series_metadata.series_description: The AG (Attorney General) Litigation Pleadings for Claims handled by the AG''s office are courtesy copies of random pleadings and legal documents that are forwarded to the Bureau by the AG''s office on subrogation cases that have been transferred to the AG''s Office or special counsel. These documents do not need a Bureau generated response.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: appropriate Assistant Attorney General or special counsel, keep it 90 days
